// SPDX-License-Identifier: MIT

export type SyntaxInfo = {
  parser?: string;
  formatavel?: boolean; // se o formatador interno tem suporte para esta extensão
};

export const syntaxMap: Record<string, SyntaxInfo> = {
  '.ts': { parser: 'typescript', formatavel: true },
  '.tsx': { parser: 'typescript', formatavel: true },
  '.cts': { parser: 'typescript', formatavel: true },
  '.mts': { parser: 'typescript', formatavel: true },
  '.js': { parser: 'babel', formatavel: true },
  '.jsx': { parser: 'babel', formatavel: true },
  '.mjs': { parser: 'babel', formatavel: true },
  '.cjs': { parser: 'babel', formatavel: true },
  '.json': { parser: 'json', formatavel: true },
  '.json5': { parser: 'json5', formatavel: true },
  '.jsonc': { parser: 'json', formatavel: true },
  '.md': { parser: 'markdown', formatavel: true },
  '.markdown': { parser: 'markdown', formatavel: true },
  '.yml': { parser: 'yaml', formatavel: true },
  '.yaml': { parser: 'yaml', formatavel: true },
  '.css': { parser: 'css', formatavel: true },
  '.scss': { parser: 'scss', formatavel: true },
  '.less': { parser: 'less', formatavel: true },
  '.html': { parser: 'html', formatavel: true },
  '.htm': { parser: 'html', formatavel: true },
  '.php': { parser: 'php', formatavel: true },
  '.xml': { parser: 'xml', formatavel: true },
  // Linguagens de programação
  '.py': { parser: 'python', formatavel: true },
  '.java': { parser: 'java', formatavel: true },
  '.kt': { parser: 'kotlin', formatavel: true },
  '.kts': { parser: 'kotlin', formatavel: true },
  '.go': { parser: 'go', formatavel: true },
  // Arquivos de configuração e sistema
  '.gitignore': { parser: 'gitignore', formatavel: true },
  '.editorconfig': { parser: 'editorconfig', formatavel: true },
  '.npmrc': { parser: 'npmrc', formatavel: true },
  '.nvmrc': { parser: 'nvmrc', formatavel: true },
  '.svg': { parser: 'xml', formatavel: true },
  '.sql': { parser: 'sql', formatavel: true },
  '.properties': { parser: 'properties', formatavel: true },
  '.gradle': { parser: 'gradle', formatavel: true },
  '.toml': { parser: 'toml', formatavel: true },
  '.lock': { parser: 'json', formatavel: true },
  '.ini': { parser: 'ini', formatavel: true },
  '.dockerfile': { parser: 'dockerfile', formatavel: true },
  '.sh': { parser: 'shell', formatavel: true },
  '.bash': { parser: 'shell', formatavel: true },
  // Arquivos de texto e logs
  '.txt': { parser: 'code', formatavel: true },
  '.log': { parser: 'code', formatavel: true },
  '.env': { parser: 'code', formatavel: true },
};

export function getSyntaxInfoForPath(relPath: string): SyntaxInfo | null {
  const p = (relPath || '').toLowerCase();
  for (const ext of Object.keys(syntaxMap)) {
    if (p.endsWith(ext)) return syntaxMap[ext];
  }
  return null;
}

export * from './contexto-projeto.js';
export * from './memory.js';
export * from './persistencia.js';
export * from './validacao.js';

export type * from './type-safety.js';
export type * from './types.js';

// SPDX-License-Identifier: MIT
declare module 'css-tree';

// SPDX-License-Identifier: MIT
declare module 'postcss-sass';

export * from './arquetipos.js';
export * from './plano-estrutura.js';

export * from './header-options.js';
export * from './licensas.js';
export * from './zelador-imports.js';

<svg viewBox="0 0 140 40" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="140" height="40">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="betaGrad" x1="0%" x2="100%" y1="0%" y2="0%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#1e3a8a"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#3b82f6"/>
    </linearGradient>
  </defs>
  <rect width="140" height="40" fill="url(#betaGrad)" rx="8"/>
  <text x="70" y="22" fill="#dbeafe" dominant-baseline="middle" font-family="Verdana,sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="bold" text-anchor="middle">BETA</text>
  </svg>

<svg viewBox="0 0 180 40" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="180" height="40">

    </linearGradient>
  </defs>
  <rect width="180" height="40" fill="#036400" rx="8"/>
  <rect width="95" height="40" fill="url(#maintainedGrad)" rx="3"/>
  <text x="44" y="22" fill="#ffffff" dominant-baseline="middle" font-family="Verdana,sans-serif" font-size="11" font-weight="bold" text-anchor="middle">ISSUE</text>
    <text x="140" y="22" fill="#ffffff" dominant-baseline="middle" font-family="Verdana,sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="bold" text-anchor="middle">OPEN</text>
    </svg>

    <text x="140" y="22" fill="#4ade80" dominant-baseline="middle" font-family="Verdana,sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="bold" text-anchor="middle">✓</text>

<svg viewBox="0 0 180 40" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="180" height="40">

    </svg>

<svg viewBox="0 0 1200 320" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="1200" height="320">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bannerBg" x1="0%" x2="100%" y1="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#140d0d"/>
      <stop offset="50%" stop-color="#0e0909"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#000000"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id="fireGrad" x1="0%" x2="100%" y1="100%" y2="0%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#cc5520"/>
      <stop offset="50%" stop-color="#e68500"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#ccac00"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id="accentGrad" x1="0%" x2="100%" y1="0%" y2="0%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#2563eb"/>
      <stop offset="50%" stop-color="#7c3aed"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#db2777"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <filter id="glow" x="-50%" y="-50%" width="200%" height="200%">
      <feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="8" result="blur"/>
      <feMerge>
        <feMergeNode in="blur"/>
        <feMergeNode in="SourceGraphic"/>
      </feMerge>
    </filter>
    <filter id="softGlow" x="-20%" y="-20%" width="140%" height="140%">
      <feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="4" result="blur"/>
      <feMerge>
        <feMergeNode in="blur"/>
        <feMergeNode in="SourceGraphic"/>
      </feMerge>
    </filter>
  </defs>
  <rect width="1200" height="320" fill="url(#bannerBg)" rx="16"/>
  <g opacity="0.015">
    <pattern id="grid" width="40" height="40" patternUnits="userSpaceOnUse">
      <path d="M 40 0 L 0 0 0 40" fill="none" stroke="#3b82f6" stroke-width="1"/>
    </pattern>
    <rect width="1200" height="320" fill="url(#grid)"/>
  </g>
  <g opacity="0.05" stroke="#3b82f6" stroke-width="1">
    <line x1="0" y1="80" x2="1200" y2="80"/>
    <line x1="0" y1="240" x2="1200" y2="240"/>
  </g>
  <g opacity="0.2">
    <circle cx="950" cy="100" r="4" fill="#3b82f6" filter="url(#softGlow)"/>
    <circle cx="980" cy="80" r="3" fill="#8b5cf6" filter="url(#softGlow)"/>
    <circle cx="1020" cy="95" r="4" fill="#ec4899" filter="url(#softGlow)"/>
    <circle cx="1050" cy="120" r="3" fill="#3b82f6" filter="url(#softGlow)"/>
    <circle cx="1010" cy="140" r="4" fill="#8b5cf6" filter="url(#softGlow)"/>
    <circle cx="920" cy="180" r="3" fill="#ec4899" filter="url(#softGlow)"/>
    <circle cx="960" cy="200" r="4" fill="#3b82f6" filter="url(#softGlow)"/>
    <circle cx="1000" cy="220" r="3" fill="#8b5cf6" filter="url(#softGlow)"/>
    <circle cx="1040" cy="200" r="4" fill="#ec4899" filter="url(#softGlow)"/>
    <g stroke="#3b82f6" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.15">
      <line x1="950" y1="100" x2="980" y2="80"/>
      <line x1="980" y1="80" x2="1020" y2="95"/>
      <line x1="1020" y1="95" x2="1050" y2="120"/>
      <line x1="1050" y1="120" x2="1010" y2="140"/>
      <line x1="1010" y1="140" x2="950" y2="100"/>
      <line x1="920" y1="180" x2="960" y2="200"/>
      <line x1="960" y1="200" x2="1000" y2="220"/>
      <line x1="1000" y1="220" x2="1040" y2="200"/>
      <line x1="1040" y1="200" x2="920" y2="180"/>
    </g>
  </g>
  <text x="600" y="130"
  font-family="'Inter', 'Segoe UI', 'Arial', sans-serif"
  font-size="72"
  font-weight="900"
  fill="url(#fireGrad)"
  text-anchor="middle"
  letter-spacing="8"
  filter="url(#softGlow)">
  PROMETHEUS
</text>
<text x="600" y="180"
font-family="'Inter', 'Segoe UI', 'Arial', sans-serif"
font-size="28"
font-weight="400"
fill="#cbd5e1"
text-anchor="middle"
letter-spacing="3">
Análise, Diagnóstico e Manutenção de Código
</text>
<text x="600" y="230"
font-family="'Inter', 'Segoe UI', 'Arial', sans-serif"
font-size="18"
font-weight="300"
fill="#64748b"
text-anchor="middle"
letter-spacing="1">
CLI modular para JavaScript/TypeScript com suporte multi-linguagem
</text>
<g transform="translate(1050, 50)" opacity="0.3">
  <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="8" fill="none" stroke="#3b82f6" stroke-width="2"/>
  <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="4" fill="#8b5cf6"/>
  <circle cx="20" cy="-15" r="6" fill="none" stroke="#ec4899" stroke-width="2"/>
  <circle cx="20" cy="-15" r="3" fill="#3b82f6"/>
</g>
<g transform="translate(60, 270)" opacity="0.2">
  <rect x="0" y="0" width="60" height="4" fill="url(#accentGrad)" rx="2"/>
  <rect x="0" y="8" width="40" height="4" fill="url(#accentGrad)" rx="2"/>
  <rect x="0" y="16" width="50" height="4" fill="url(#accentGrad)" rx="2"/>
</g>
</svg>
